# MOHAVE COMMUNITY COLLEGE BIO181

- Transfer pipettes
- Test tube rack
- 4 large (20 ml) test tubes or small Erlenmeyer flasks for larger volumes
- Large plastic tray
- Masking tape or lab tape
- Large weigh boat (4/group)
- Metric ruler
- Electronic balance
- Spatula
- Weigh paper
- Red food coloring (optional)

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 |  | *8 ml | *6 ml | 0 ml |
| 2 |  | *12 ml | 0 ml | *2 ml |
| 3 |  | *6 ml | *6 ml | *2 ml |
| 4 |  | *2 ml | *6 ml | *6 ml |
